title: Fubric API
body:
Fubric API: The World's Most Ineffective Minecraft Mod
![fpschart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/537f680c7dd0e142e61354ec54ec0fcbe859f5d1.png)

Captured on a rtx 4080 

Tired of your Minecraft world running too smoothly? Does your game load too quickly? Are your framerates too high? Fear not, for Fubric API is here to solve all your problems... by doing absolutely nothing!

This revolutionary mod is designed to significantly decrease your Minecraft performance. It's the perfect solution for those who enjoy the thrill of lag spikes, the excitement of loading screens, and the joy of watching their computer struggle.

<iframe width="775" height="455" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/p2j3xlCfyjA" title="Fubric Api" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Key Features:

. Revolutionary Lag Engine: Experience mind-blowing lag, even on the most powerful computers.
. Cutting-Edge Loading Screen Technology: Watch your world load at a snail's pace.
. State-of-the-Art Frame Rate Reduction: Enjoy choppy, stuttering gameplay.
. Advanced Crash Simulator: Crash your game with ease.

![Increase your Fps instability.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6915f35e32c7c99fadaed80030ff927e53e6717e.png)
Increase your Fps instability.

![Increase memory usage because the more the better!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e5b934f8961f5c556a23e1d84fbd4bba13aa59d.png)
Increase memory usage because the more the better!
